title: Airess Trilogy3 pet odour neutraliser Air Freshener Refill, 90 Days Freshness. Fits Ambi pur and trilogy plug ins.
features: LONG-LASTING FRESHNESS: pet odour neutraliser scented air freshener refill that provides up to 90 days of continuous fragrance
REFILL COMPATIBILITY: Designed as a refill cartridge for the Trilogy 3 and Ambi pur air freshener system, ensuring seamless replacement
NATURAL SCENT: Delightful blend of pet odour neutraliser fragrance that creates an inviting atmosphere in any room
CONVENIENT DESIGN: Easy-to-install refill cartridge with clear packaging that allows monitoring of remaining product
COVERAGE: Suitable for rooms and spaces requiring consistent air freshening, with gradual fragrance release technology
description: Transform your space with the delightful Trilogy pet odour neutraliser air freshener refill. This long-lasting fragrance solution provides up to 90 days of continuous freshness, filling your environment with the sweet and invigorating scent of mixed forest berries. The refill cartridge is designed for easy installation and delivers a consistent aroma throughout its lifespan. Perfect for homes, offices, or any indoor space where you want to maintain a pleasant atmosphere. The balanced blend captures the essence of clean freshness, creating an inviting ambiance that helps mask unwanted odours. Compatible with Airess Trilogy and Ambi pur air freshener systems, this refill offers a practical and effective solution for long-term fragrance needs.
